subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the most famous art form of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Folk Dance is the most famous art form of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following princely states was merged with the Indian Union in 1949?

explanation_en: Jaipur was the capital of Rajasthan before the merger with India in 1949.
Jaipur was the capital of Rajasthan before the merger with India in 1949.
